ucs.title: [LLM] Moonstone Sleet trojanized npm package — node/npm postinstall hook spawning network downloader
ucs.description: Hunts Moonstone Sleet's (Storm-1789) signature supply-chain TTP: malicious npm packages (e.g. 'execution-time-async', 'data-time-utils', 'logging-system-utils') published from fake-developer accounts whose preinstall/postinstall lifecycle scripts shell out to download a second-stage payload. Detects node.exe / npm.cmd / yarn / pnpm parenting a LOLBin downloader (powershell/curl/wget/certutil/bitsadmin/mshta) with HTTP-fetch arguments to non-registry destinations.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.exe","yarn.exe","pnpm.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process Processes.process_id Processes.parent_process_id
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| where match(process,"(?i)(https?://|Invoke-WebRequest|DownloadString|DownloadFile|-OutFile|IEX|FromBase64String|-decode|--remote-name)")
| where NOT match(process,"(?i)(registry\.npmjs\.org|registry\.yarnpkg\.com|registry\.npmmirror\.com|github\.com|nodejs\.org|raw\.githubusercontent\.com)")
| where NOT match(parent_process,"(?i)(electron|webpack|vite|esbuild|jest|mocha|cypress)")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Moonstone Sleet — trojanized npm package install chain
// Storm-1789 publishes npm packages with malicious pre/postinstall scripts
// that fetch a second-stage from actor infra during `npm install`.
let _downloaders = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
let _registry_hosts = dynamic(["registry.npmjs.org","registry.yarnpkg.com","registry.npmmirror.com","nodejs.org","raw.githubusercontent.com","github.com"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.exe","yarn.exe","pnpm.exe")
   or InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.exe","yarn.exe","pnpm.exe")
| where FileName in~ (_downloaders)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://","Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","DownloadFile","-OutFile","IEX","Invoke-Expression","FromBase64String","--decode","--remote-name")
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any (_registry_hosts))
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend SuspectUrl = extract(@"(?i)(https?://[^\s\"']+)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          NpmParent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          NpmCmd    = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Grandparent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          Child     = FileName,
          ChildCmd  = ProcessCommandLine,
          SuspectUrl, SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Moonstone Sleet — trojanized npm package install chain (Sentinel/4688)
let _downloaders = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
let _registry_hosts = dynamic(["registry.npmjs.org","registry.yarnpkg.com","registry.npmmirror.com","nodejs.org","raw.githubusercontent.com","github.com"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where ParentProcessName has_any ("\\node.exe","\\npm.cmd","\\npm.exe","\\npx.exe","\\yarn.exe","\\pnpm.exe")
| extend ChildBin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ChildBin in (_downloaders)
| where CommandLine has_any ("http://","https://","Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","DownloadFile","-OutFile","IEX","Invoke-Expression","FromBase64String","--decode","--remote-name")
| where not(CommandLine has_any (_registry_hosts))
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend SuspectUrl = extract(@"(?i)(https?://[^\s\"']+)", 1, CommandLine)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, SuspectUrl
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Moonstone Sleet npm Package Install Chain to Network Downloader
id: 7c3b6f1a-9a52-4b6a-b1d9-7f5e3a1cf001
status: experimental
description: Detects Moonstone Sleet (Storm-1789) trojanized npm package execution where node/npm/yarn/pnpm parents a LOLBin downloader fetching a non-registry URL during package install lifecycle hooks.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2024/05/28/moonstone-sleet-emerges-as-new-north-korean-threat-actor-with-new-bag-of-tricks/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1036/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1195.002
  - attack.t1105
  - attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\node.exe'
      - '\npm.cmd'
      - '\npm.exe'
      - '\npx.exe'
      - '\yarn.exe'
      - '\pnpm.exe'
  child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\wget.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  fetch:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'http://'
      - 'https://'
      - 'Invoke-WebRequest'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'DownloadFile'
      - '-OutFile'
      - 'IEX'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'FromBase64String'
  filter_registry:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'registry.npmjs.org'
      - 'registry.yarnpkg.com'
      - 'registry.npmmirror.com'
      - 'github.com'
      - 'nodejs.org'
  condition: parent and child and fetch and not filter_registry
falsepositives:
  - Internal package mirrors served from non-public hosts (allowlist domain)
  - Postinstall hooks that legitimately download Electron/binary deps (allowlist publisher)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Moonstone Sleet's distinguishing tradecraft (per Microsoft May 2024 advisory) is publishing trojanized npm packages from fake-developer personas. The chain — npm/node parent → LOLBin child → outbound HTTP to non-registry host during install — is unique to npm-borne supply-chain implants and isn't characteristic of more conventional KP actors like Lazarus/Diamond Sleet. Filtering against legitimate

_field_issues.message: `SuspectUrl` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `SuspectUrl` is not a canonical column of SecurityEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] Moonstone Sleet fake-recruiter trojanized utility — signed binary from user-writable path with sideloaded DLL and immediate C2
ucs.description: Hunts Moonstone Sleet's social-engineering chain: fake recruiter / fake-company persona on LinkedIn (e.g. StarGlow Ventures, C.C. Waterfall, Detankzone) delivers a trojanized utility (PuTTY-variant, AnyDesk fork, or the DeTankWar/DeTankZone game executable) to the victim. The malicious binary, run from Downloads/AppData/Public, sideloads an attacker DLL from its own folder and beacons to public infrastructure within ~60s of launch.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_path IN ("*\\Users\\*\\Downloads\\*","*\\Users\\*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*") AND Processes.process_name IN ("putty.exe","anydesk.exe","sumatrapdf.exe","detankwar.exe","detankzone.exe","tankzone.exe","chrome_proxy.exe","node-webkit.exe") by _time Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_path Processes.process Processes.process_id
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| rename process_id as procId, dest as host
| join type=inner host procId [
    | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_category!="internal" AND All_Traffic.dest_port IN (80,443,8080,8443) by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port All_Traffic.process_id _time
    | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)`
    | rename process_id as procId, src as host
  ]
| where _time<=_time+60
| stats values(process) as cmd values(dest) as remote_ip values(dest_port) as remote_port by host user process_name process_path
ucs.kql:
// Moonstone Sleet — fake-recruiter trojanized utility: user-writable path binary +
// adjacent DLL sideload + outbound public C2 within 60s of launch.
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowSec = 60;
let _suspect_bins = dynamic(["putty.exe","anydesk.exe","sumatrapdf.exe","detankwar.exe","detankzone.exe","tankzone.exe","chrome_proxy.exe","node-webkit.exe","nw.exe"]);
let _user_paths = dynamic([@"\Users\",@"\AppData\Local\Temp\",@"\AppData\Roaming\",@"\Public\",@"\ProgramData\",@"\Downloads\"]);
let Launches = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (_suspect_bins)
    | where FolderPath has_any (_user_paths)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("explorer.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","outlook.exe","teams.exe","7zg.exe","winrar.exe","explorer.exe")
    | project LaunchTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SuspectBin = FileName, SuspectFolder = FolderPath,
              SuspectPid = ProcessId, SuspectSha = SHA256, SuspectCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
let Sideloads = DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_suspect_bins)
    | where FolderPath =~ InitiatingProcessFolderPath          // DLL next to the EXE
    | where SHA256 != InitiatingProcessSHA256                  // not the EXE itself
    | where not(FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\")
    | project SideloadTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              LoadedDll = FileName, LoadedDllSha = SHA256,
              LoaderPid = InitiatingProcessId;
let Egress = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","ConnectionAttempt")
    | where RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_suspect_bins)
    | project NetTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              NetPid = InitiatingProcessId,
              RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl;
Launches
| join kind=inner Sideloads on DeviceId, $left.SuspectPid == $right.LoaderPid
| where SideloadTime between (LaunchTime .. LaunchTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| join kind=inner Egress on DeviceId, $left.SuspectPid == $right.NetPid
| where NetTime between (LaunchTime .. LaunchTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project LaunchTime, DeviceName, AccountName,
          SuspectBin, SuspectFolder, SuspectSha, SuspectCmd,
          LoadedDll, LoadedDllSha,
          RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl,
          DelayLoadSec = datetime_diff('second', SideloadTime, LaunchTime),
          DelayNetSec  = datetime_diff('second', NetTime, LaunchTime)
| order by LaunchTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Moonstone Sleet — fake-recruiter trojanized utility (Sentinel via SecurityEvent 4688 +
// CommonSecurityLog egress). Note: DLL-sideload telemetry requires Sysmon EID 7.
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowSec = 60;
let _suspect_bins = dynamic(["putty.exe","anydesk.exe","sumatrapdf.exe","detankwar.exe","detankzone.exe","tankzone.exe","chrome_proxy.exe","node-webkit.exe","nw.exe"]);
let _user_paths = dynamic([@"\Users\",@"\AppData\Local\Temp\",@"\AppData\Roaming\",@"\Public\",@"\ProgramData\",@"\Downloads\"]);
let Launches = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend BinName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where BinName in (_suspect_bins)
    | where NewProcessName has_any (_user_paths)
    | where ParentProcessName has_any ("\\explorer.exe","\\chrome.exe","\\msedge.exe","\\firefox.exe","\\outlook.exe","\\teams.exe","\\7zg.exe","\\winrar.exe")
    | project LaunchTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              SuspectBin = BinName, SuspectPath = NewProcessName,
              SuspectPid = NewProcessId, SuspectCmd = CommandLine;
let Egress = ImNetworkSession
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where DvcAction !in ("Drop","Reject","Deny")
    | where not(ipv4_is_private(DstIpAddr))
    | where ActingProcessName has_any ("putty.exe","anydesk.exe","sumatrapdf.exe","detankwar.exe","detankzone.exe","tankzone.exe","chrome_proxy.exe","nw.exe")
    | project NetTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = DvcHostname,
              DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, Url, ActingProcessName;
Launches
| join kind=inner Egress on Computer
| where NetTime between (LaunchTime .. LaunchTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project LaunchTime, Computer, Account, SuspectBin, SuspectPath, SuspectCmd,
          DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, Url,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', NetTime, LaunchTime)
| order by LaunchTime desc
ucs.rationale: Microsoft attributes Moonstone Sleet specifically to a LinkedIn fake-recruiter / fake-company chain delivering trojanized utilities (PuTTY variant inherited from Lazarus, plus the actor-unique DeTankWar/DeTankZone game and AnyDesk forks). The triad — utility-named binary in a user-writable path + DLL sideload from the EXE's own folder + immediate public C2 within 60s — is the deliverable shape of

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession, SecurityEvent; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
